title: Pain Point (audience-specific)
description: v1.1 alignment · sub-audience storage v2.64. Pain point ressenti par audience(s). Storage: brands/{slug}/audiences/{audience_slug}/pain_points/{PNT-NN}.json (NEW v2.64 · sub-audience sémantique pure · pain_point est expression audience-specific). Cross-refs audiences additionnelles via also_affects_audiences[] quand pain shared cross-audiences (canonical entry stocké chez primary owner audience). v1.0 baseline ship v2.63 · refactor ontologie pure · extracted from profile.pain_points[] legacy v1.7. Same pattern que friction · top-level collection à l'origine, sub-audience location post-v2.64.

_changelog.1.1: v2.64 BREAKING storage path · sub-audience location · sémantique pure (pain = expression audience-specific). Migration via operations/migrations/v2.64-subfolder-collections.py idempotent. also_affects_audiences[] cross-refs ajoutés pour pain shared scenarios.
_changelog.1.0: v2.63 baseline. Extracted from profile.pain_points[] legacy v1.7 (BREAKING). Now top-level collection canonical. PNT-NN id pattern. Cross-refs affected_audiences[] + affected_products[] (cohérence friction). Closes ontologie inconsistance (friction top-level mais pain sub-field legacy).

pain_id.description: Stable id PNT-NN format. Cohérent canonical IDs PhantomOS (FRC-NN, OBJ-NN, ANG-NN, CRT-NN, etc.).

source.description: Reddit thread, Trustpilot review id, etc.

also_affects_audiences.description: v1.1 (v2.64) optional · cross-refs vers AUTRES audiences qui partagent ce pain canonical (pour éviter duplication si pain shared cross-audiences). Canonical entry stocké chez primary owner audience (1ère dans affected_audiences[]) · also_affects_audiences[] liste les audiences additionnelles qui partagent le pain. Permet join-style queries cross-audience sans dupliquer le fichier.

derived_angle_refs.description: Back-ref · angles qui exploitent ce pain comme observation
